flashcards.definition: Online banks offer 10-100× higher savings rates than traditional banks due to lower overhead costs.
Strategy of dividing deposits across CDs with staggered maturity dates to balance rate and access.
Keeping money in a 0.05% account vs. 4.5% on $25,000 costs ~$1,112/year in lost earnings.
Maintenance fees, overdraft fees, ATM fees — can erode returns if not managed (choose fee-free options).
Consistent savings + compound interest over 40+ years builds substantial wealth from modest contributions.
